ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used by the user */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the user accessed the platform */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for detailed device and browser information */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views during the session */,
  "conversion_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a conversion occurred during the session */,
  "source_campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source marketing campaign */,
  "user_session_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the quality of user engagement during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_device FOREIGN KEY ("device") REFERENCES devices ("device_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_source_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES channels ("channel_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "user_engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the overall engagement of the user */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred marketing channel of the user */,
  "preferred_device" TEXT /* Preferred device of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the channel (e.g., social media, email, search) */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Status of the channel (active, inactive) */,
  "channel_partner" TEXT /* Name of the partner or platform */,
  "estimated_reach" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the channel */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Historical conversion rate of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "device_screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the device */,
  "device_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "device_browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "device_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign started */,
  "campaign_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign ended */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (active, inactive) */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated marketing channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user receives email notifications */,
  "sms_notifications" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user receives SMS notifications */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the user */,
  "preferred_time_zone" TEXT /* Preferred time zone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recommended content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of the recommended content (e.g., article, product) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user accepted the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
